userFlows: Manage user profile and account settings
Receive desktop notification for @mention in channel
Notification preferences per-channel override global settings
Do Not Disturb mode suppresses all notifications
Keyword-triggered notifications fire for custom words
Notification sound plays for new messages in focused channel
Search for messages by keyword and verify results appear
Filter search results by date range
Navigate to a message from search results
Search highlights matching terms in results
Open search results in a popout window and verify results display
Open thread in popout window and post a reply
Popout window syncs with main window in real-time
Close popout window and verify main window state is unchanged
Multiple popout windows can be open simultaneously
Filter users by role (admin, member, guest) and verify table updates
Toggle column visibility and verify columns appear/disappear
Export filtered user list to CSV and verify content
Search for a user by name or email in system users table
Sort users by column header and verify order
Open product switcher menu and verify all product links are visible
Click a product link in the switcher and verify navigation
Open product in new tab via the open-in-new-tab button
Verify active product is highlighted in the switcher menu
Close product switcher menu by clicking outside or pressing Escape
Open Recaps from LHS sidebar and verify recap list loads
Create a new recap by selecting channels and confirming
Select and deselect channels in recap creation modal
View a recap summary and verify content is relevant to selected channels
Delete a recap and verify it is removed from the list
Recaps LHS sidebar icon is visible and correctly aligned
Login with valid email and password
Login fails with incorrect password and shows error
Sign up a new user with email and verify account creation
Reset password via email link and login with new password
Session expires and user is redirected to login page
Create a new team with display name and URL
Team URL validation rejects invalid characters
Join an existing team via invite link
Switch between teams using team sidebar
View license details and active user count in System Console
Overage users banner appears when user count exceeds license limit
Single-channel guest limit banner displays when threshold reached
System analytics dashboard shows correct user and post counts
Upload and apply a new license key
Mention user groups with AI suggestions
Navigate to user groups from product menu
View user profile with privacy settings
Open flagged post details in RHS
View custom profile attributes in user popover
Edit custom profile attributes in user settings
Validate custom attribute field types (text, URL, select, multiselect)
Delete draft when root post is deleted
Open emoji picker from post textbox
Upload file attachment to thread reply
Send scheduled message at specified time
Auto-add users to channels via LDAP sync
Test policy with all attribute types
Sync user attributes with ABAC policies
View feature discovery for premium features
Handle button click in message attachment
Accept terms of service on login
View read receipts on sent messages
